faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about HomeCheff. Can't find your question? Contact us!
faq.contactDescription: Our customer service is happy to help. We usually respond within 24 hours.

0.question: What is HomeCheff?
0.answer:
HomeCheff is a local platform where individuals can sell their handmade products. We focus on homemade dishes, fresh products from your own garden, and handmade creations. The platform connects local makers with consumers in their neighborhood.

🎯 Our mission: Reducing food waste by sharing surplus meals and products. If you cook for yourself and have too much, you can share it with others in your neighborhood. This contributes to a more sustainable and social community.

💰 PRACTICAL BENEFITS:
• Extra income to fund your hobby
• Deduct expenses from your revenue
• Annual vacation (max €2000)
• Monthly supplement to benefits possible
• Fund renovations or extras

1.question: How does HomeCheff work?
1.answer:
For private sellers, the platform is completely free! You only pay transaction fees so the app can continue to exist. Companies with a KVK number can choose a subscription. Buyers can search, filter, and buy local products.

🤝 COMMUNITY:
• Connect local makers and buyers
• Reduce waste through sharing
• Support handmade products
• Stimulate conscious consumption

2.question: Is HomeCheff free to use?
2.answer: Yes! For private sellers, HomeCheff is completely free. You pay no monthly costs, only transaction fees on each sale. For companies with a KVK number, subscriptions are available.

3.question: In which cities is HomeCheff available?
3.answer: HomeCheff is currently available throughout the Netherlands. We focus on local communities and gradually expand to more regions.

4.question: How can I contact HomeCheff?
4.answer: You can reach us via support@homecheff.eu, our helpdesk in the app, or via the contact page. We usually respond within 24 hours.

5.question: Can I earn extra income alongside my benefits?
5.answer:
Yes, you can earn extra income alongside your benefits, but there are rules:

💰 BENEFITS AND EXTRA INCOME:
• Wajong: 70% of your income is deducted from your benefits
• Social assistance: You can keep part of your income
• All income must be reported to the UWV within 1 week

💡 PRACTICAL TIPS:
• Keep track of your expenses for deduction from your revenue
• Consult with the UWV about your specific situation
• Use your hobby to generate extra income
• Take advantage of available exemptions

⚠️ IMPORTANT: Always contact the UWV before you start selling! HomeCheff is only a platform and does not provide tax or benefits advice.

6.question: What is HomeCheff's liability?
6.answer:
⚠️ IMPORTANT LEGAL INFORMATION:

HomeCheff is only a platform that connects sellers and buyers. We are NOT responsible for:
• Product quality
• Disputes between sellers and buyers
• Damage from products
• Loss or theft during delivery
• User tax returns
• Benefits arrangements

All transactions are between seller and buyer. HomeCheff only mediates in disputes but is not liable for the outcome.

By using HomeCheff, you agree to these terms.

0.question: How do I become a seller on HomeCheff?
0.answer:
Register your account, choose a seller role (Chef, Garden, Designer), and fill in your bank details. For individuals, no subscription is needed - you can start selling immediately! Small businesses can optionally choose a subscription for favorable rates.

🤝 LOCAL COMMUNITY:
• Focus on reducing waste
• Reuse materials and ingredients
• Share your handmade story
• Inspire others to consume consciously

1.question: What subscriptions are available for sellers?
1.answer:
For individuals: Completely free! You only pay transaction fees.

For small businesses, optional subscriptions are available with different rates. You can always upgrade or downgrade to another subscription.

🤝 LOCAL COMMUNITY:
• No extra costs for handmade products
• Support for local makers
• Reward for reducing waste

For specific prices and rates, you can log into your account and go to the subscription section.

2.question: What can I sell on HomeCheff?
2.answer:
Only handmade products of your own making that reduce waste:

🍳 CHEF (Local cooking):
• Homemade dishes from local ingredients
• Surplus meals to reduce waste
• Seasonal dishes
• Reuse leftovers and ingredients

🌱 GARDEN (Local gardening):
• Self-grown vegetables, fruits, herbs
• Share surplus harvest
• Seeds and cuttings from your own plants
• Support local biodiversity

🎨 DESIGNER (Handmade creating):
• Upcycled and recycled items
• Handmade art from leftover materials
• Restored and refurbished items
• Use local materials

🤝 No trade or resale of factory products. All products must contribute to the local community.

3.question: How do I get my money paid out?
3.answer:
Payouts happen automatically via Stripe Connect to your specified bank account.

⏱️ PAYOUT PERIOD:
• Normal orders: 7 days after payment (new accounts)
• Faster payout: 2-3 business days (with positive history)
• Shipping (parcel post): After delivery confirmation (escrow system)

💰 PRACTICAL BENEFITS:
• Faster payout for handmade products
• Extra reward for reducing waste
• Transparent costs for local makers
• Escrow protection for shipping

📧 NOTIFICATION:
You will receive an email when the payout is processed.

⚠️ IMPORTANT: HomeCheff is only a platform. We are not responsible for product quality or disputes between sellers and buyers.

4.question: How can I sell effectively on HomeCheff?
4.answer:
Focus on handmade quality and reducing waste:

♻️ AGAINST WASTE:
• Reuse materials and ingredients
• Repair and upcycle old items
• Share surplus products
• Mention how you reduce waste

🌿 LOCAL PRACTICES:
• Use local and seasonal ingredients
• Minimize packaging materials
• Choose local materials
• Inspire others to live consciously

🤝 COMMUNITY:
• Share your handmade story
• Teach others how to upcycle
• Build a conscious sales culture

5.question: Can I edit or delete my products?
5.answer:
Yes, you can always edit your products, adjust stock, change prices, or temporarily deactivate products. Deletion is also possible, but this affects your statistics.

🤝 LOCAL COMMUNITY:
• Update handmade product information
• Add new local aspects
• Adjust packaging information
• Share updates about your waste reduction initiatives

6.question: How can I orfer future products?
6.answer:
HomeCheff's reservation system helps you reduce waste by planning ahead:

📅 FUTURE AVAILABILITY:
• Offer products up to 1 week in advance
• Perfect for when you know you'll make too much
• Let buyers reserve in advance
• Prevent waste through planning

🎯 EXAMPLES:
• BBQ weekend: 'Extra hamburgers - reserve in advance'
• Party: 'Cake too big for our family'
• Cooking day: 'Extra pasta portions - 3 days ahead'

♻️ BENEFITS:
• You know exactly how much to make
• No more food waste
• Buyers can plan
• Better earnings through planning

2.question: What are HomeCheff Points (HCP)?
2.answer:
HCP reward active, constructive participation: listing items, ordering, reviews, consistent quality, and community contributions. They give a simple view of engagement and visibility on leaderboards.

HCP are not cash, but they reflect your effort as a maker or enthusiast on the platform.

3.question: How do HCP leaderboards work?
3.answer:
On the rankings page you can see who scores highest near you, in your country, or worldwide for a chosen period (week, month, year, all-time). You can filter by nearby (with location), country, or worldwide.

Logged-in users see their own position where available. From profiles you can open makers and their listings — combining discovery with community.

4.question: How do I install the HomeCheff app and stay up to date?
4.answer:
You will find install information on the site and in your profile or notifications when a new version ships. Turn on notifications for orders, messages, and updates from makers you follow so you do not miss local opportunities.

For payments, delivery, or safety, see the other FAQ categories on this page.

0.question: What features does HomeCheff have?
0.answer:
HomeCheff offers various features to improve your experience:

✨ STANDARD FEATURES:
• Profile statistics: See total fans, favorites, reviews, rating, and views
• Interactive photos: Swipe through multiple photos of products and items
• Auto-slide photos: Photos automatically slide during scrolling
• Favorites tab: Save and view all your favorite products in one place
• Product statistics: See views, favorites, and reviews directly on product tiles
• Swipe navigation: Swipe between Village Square and Inspiration pages (mobile)
• Smart search function: Find what you're looking for faster with filters
• User statistics: Discover popular makers via their total statistics

1.question: How do profile statistics work?
1.answer:
On each product or inspiration item, you'll see a statistics section for the maker:

📊 PROFILE STATISTICS:
• Total Fans: Number of people following this maker
• Total Favorites: Total number of times all items have been favorited
• Total Reviews: Total number of reviews for all items
• Average Rating: Average rating for all items
• Total Views: Total number of views for all items

🎯 WHY USEFUL:
• Discover popular makers in your neighborhood
• See who's trustworthy through reviews and ratings
• Follow makers with interesting content
• Click on statistics to go to their profile

💡 Tip: Statistics show total figures for all items from the maker, not just this specific item.

2.question: How does the photo slider work?
2.answer:
Products and inspiration items with multiple photos have an interactive slider:

🖼️ PHOTO SLIDER:
• Multiple photos: View all photos of a product on one tile
• Swipe on mobile: Swipe horizontally to navigate through photos
• Arrows on desktop: Use arrows to browse through photos
• Auto-slide: Photos automatically slide during scrolling
• Stops on interaction: Auto-slide pauses 5 seconds after your action
• Hover pause: Auto-slide stops when you hover over the photo

🎯 WHY HANDY:
• See all photos without opening the product
• Better impression of the product before clicking
• Save time by quickly scrolling through photos
• Professional presentation of your products

💡 Tip: Swipe on mobile or click arrows on desktop to manually navigate through photos.

3.question: What is the Favorites tab in my profile?
3.answer:
The Favorites tab keeps all your favorite items in one central place:

❤️ FAVORITES:
• All favorites: See all products and items you've favorited
• Quick access: Go directly to your favorite items without searching
• Organization: Keep your favorite makers and products organized
• Updates: Stay updated on favorite products and makers

🎯 HOW TO USE:
• Click the heart on a product to favorite it
• Go to your profile and click the 'Favorites' tab
• View all your favorite items in one place
• Click an item to go directly to the product

💡 Tip: Favorites help you quickly return to items you found interesting.

4.question: What do the statistics on product tiles mean?
4.answer:
On each product tile, you'll see important statistics:

📈 PRODUCT STATISTICS:
• Views (👁️): Number of times this specific product has been viewed
• Favorites (❤️): Number of people who have favorited this product
• Reviews (⭐): Number of reviews for this specific product
• Rating: Average rating for this product

🎯 DIFFERENCE FROM PROFILE STATISTICS:
• Product statistics: Specific to this one product
• Profile statistics: Total across all items from the maker

💡 WHY USEFUL:
• See directly how popular a product is
• Make better choices by viewing reviews and ratings
• Discover trending products in your neighborhood
• Compare products based on statistics

⚠️ Important: Product statistics only show figures for this specific product, not for all products from the maker.

5.question: How does swipe navigation between pages work?
5.answer:
On mobile devices, you can swipe between Village Square and Inspiration:

📱 SWIPE NAVIGATION:
• Swipe left: Go from Village Square to Inspiration
• Swipe right: Go from Inspiration to Village Square
• Minimum 100px swipe needed to navigate
• Only works on touch devices (mobile/tablet)

🎯 WHY HANDY:
• Quick navigation between main pages
• Intuitive mobile experience
• No menu needed to switch
• Efficient browsing on mobile

💡 Tip: Swipe navigation only works if you swipe horizontally. Vertical scrolling works normally.

6.question: How can I start the tour?
6.answer:
The tour helps you discover the app:

✨ TOUR:
• Look for the 'Start tour' button on the page
• The button has a ✨ (stars) icon
• Click the button to start the tour
• Follow the steps to discover all features

🎯 HOW IT WORKS:
• No automatic start: Only starts when you click the button
• Per page: Each page has its own tour
• Skip: You can always skip the tour
• Repeatable: Start the tour again whenever you want

💡 Tip: The tour doesn't start automatically - you have full control. Click 'Start tour' when you're ready to learn!

privacyPage.subtitle: Your privacy and security are our priority
privacyPage.safeDataStorageDesc: All personal data is encrypted and stored securely, accessible only to you and our secure systems.
privacyPage.noDataSharingDesc: We do not sell your personal data. To run the platform we use service providers (for example payments, sign-in, hosting, email, messaging infrastructure, and optional aggregated analytics). They receive only what is needed to deliver those services.

privacyPage.serviceProvidersBody: Depending on the features you use, subprocessors may include: Stripe (payments and payouts), Google (sign-in and, where configured, Firebase for push notifications and related app services), hosting and storage providers, email delivery (for example Resend), real-time messaging infrastructure (for example Pusher), optional SMS (for example Twilio) if we enable it, and optional aggregated analytics (for example Google Analytics) when turned on in our deployment. We use industry-standard transport security (such as HTTPS/TLS) between your device and our servers where applicable.
privacyPage.encryptionDesc: All sensitive data is encrypted with industry-standard encryption (AES-256). Passwords are hashed with bcrypt.
privacyPage.secureServersDesc: Our servers run in secure data centers with 24/7 monitoring and regular security audits.
privacyPage.accessControlDesc: Only authorized personnel have access to systems, and all access is logged and monitored.
privacyPage.rightToAccessDesc: You can always request an overview of all data we have stored about you.
privacyPage.rightToCorrectionDesc: You can always adjust or correct your data via your profile settings.
privacyPage.rightToDeletionDesc: You can request deletion of your account and associated personal data via your profile or by contacting support. Some information may be retained where required by law or for legitimate accounting and security purposes.
privacyPage.rightToPortabilityDesc: You can export your data in a standard format for use elsewhere.

deleteAccountPage.intro: You can delete your HomeCheff account and personal data yourself in the app or from your profile settings. Below is what happens and what we may retain for legal reasons.

overOns.title: About us
overOns.subtitle: Who we are, what we do and how to reach us.
overOns.whoWeAre1: HomeCheff is the platform where your neighborhood comes together: makers, cooks, gardeners and designers share their creations, recipes and harvest. We believe the best flavours and ideas are often right around the corner — and that everyone has something to share.
overOns.whoWeAre2: We're building a place where you get inspiration on our Inspiration square and where you can buy and sell locally on the Village Square. It's all about fair trade, direct payouts and a community that supports each other.
overOns.whoWeAre3: Whether you cook at home, grow in the garden or design with your hands: on HomeCheff your creations have a place and you reach people in your own region.
overOns.mission1: We want to make local making and buying natural again. By connecting sellers and buyers directly, we keep transactions simple and fair. Sellers receive their payouts quickly and transparently; buyers discover unique products from people nearby.
overOns.mission2: We also want to offer a place where you share ideas and recipes without having to sell — our Inspiration section is for everyone who wants to inspire and be inspired.
overOns.whatWeDo1: Inspiration: sharing recipes, growing tips and designs with the community.
overOns.whatWeDo2: Village Square: offering and buying products locally, with secure payments and clear agreements.
overOns.whatWeDo3: Direct payouts for sellers, without unnecessary middlemen.
overOns.whatWeDo4: A platform that works for both hobbyists and small businesses.
overOns.reachabilityTitle: Reachability — who to contact for what

safetyPage.title: Safety Standards
safetyPage.subtitle: Child safety, reporting and enforcement on HomeCheff
safetyPage.zeroToleranceTitle: Zero tolerance for child sexual abuse and exploitation
safetyPage.zeroToleranceCsam: HomeCheff does not allow child sexual abuse material (CSAM) or any content that sexualises, exploits or endangers minors.
safetyPage.zeroToleranceMinors: HomeCheff does not allow sexual content involving minors, grooming, or any attempt to contact minors for sexual purposes.
safetyPage.reportingIntro: If you see content or behaviour that may harm someone, report it immediately. You can report:
safetyPage.reportingContent: Abusive or inappropriate content (posts, photos, videos)
safetyPage.reportingMessages: Harmful or threatening messages in chat
safetyPage.reportingProfiles: User profiles that violate our policies
safetyPage.reportingListings: Listings or products that are unsafe or prohibited
safetyPage.reportingInApp: Use the Report option in the app or website on the relevant item, message or profile. You can also email our safety team (see below).
safetyPage.enforcementReview: HomeCheff reviews reports and may request additional information.
safetyPage.enforcementRemove: We may remove content, restrict features, suspend accounts or permanently ban users who violate these standards.
safetyPage.enforcementSuspend: Repeated or severe violations result in stronger action, including permanent removal from the platform.
safetyPage.enforcementAuthorities: Where required by law, HomeCheff may report serious violations (including CSAM) to relevant authorities and cooperate with law enforcement.
safetyPage.communityBody: All users must follow our Community Guidelines and Terms of Service. These rules apply to messaging, profiles, listings, reviews and all other community features on HomeCheff.
safetyPage.contactIntro: For child safety concerns, abuse reports or urgent safety matters, contact:
safetyPage.footerNote: This page is published by HomeCheff and is not editable by users. It may be updated from time to time.

communityGuidelinesPage.title: Community Guidelines
communityGuidelinesPage.subtitle: Respectful, honest and safe participation on HomeCheff
communityGuidelinesPage.respect1: Treat other users with respect. Harassment, hate speech, threats and bullying are not allowed.
communityGuidelinesPage.respect2: Do not share private information about others without consent.
communityGuidelinesPage.respect3: Use messaging and comments for constructive, community-oriented communication.
communityGuidelinesPage.content1: Share only content you have the right to share. Do not post misleading, illegal or harmful material.
communityGuidelinesPage.content2: Listings must accurately describe handmade products you offer. No counterfeit goods or prohibited items.
communityGuidelinesPage.content3: Follow applicable food safety and local laws when selling food or garden products.
communityGuidelinesPage.commerceBody: Complete transactions through HomeCheff where payment is involved. Reviews must be honest and based on real experiences.
communityGuidelinesPage.safetyBody: Report concerns using in-app tools or our Safety Standards page. Serious violations may lead to account action or referral to authorities.
communityGuidelinesPage.footerNote: These guidelines complement our Terms of Service, Privacy Policy and Safety Standards.

promoCodes.title: Promo Codes
promoCodes.noPromoCodesDesc: Create your first promo code to start offering discounts
promoCodes.forBusinessSubscriptions: For business subscriptions: discount comes from your 50% commission
promoCodes.discountExplanation: This percentage is of YOUR commission, not of the total price. The discount amount comes from your share, HomeCheff's share always remains the same.
promoCodes.discountExplanationDetail: EXAMPLE: For a €100 subscription, a main affiliate gets €50 commission (50% of €100). If you give 20% discount, that means 20% of YOUR €50 = €10 discount. The business pays €90, you get €40 (from your €50 commission), and HomeCheff always gets €50.
promoCodes.discountExplanationSubDetail: Made affiliates: for a €100 subscription, a made affiliate gets €40 commission (40% of €100, which is 80% of the main affiliate's 50% commission). You can give a maximum of 75% of your €40 = €30 discount. The business pays €70, you get €10 (25% of your €40 commission = 10% of total), and your main affiliate gets €10.
promoCodes.maxDiscountRuleMain: You can give a maximum of 80% of your own commission as discount. You must always keep at least 20% of your commission (10% of the total price). This can be via discount or via a made affiliate.
promoCodes.maxDiscountRuleSub: As a made affiliate, you receive 40% commission (80% of the main affiliate's 50% commission). From your €40 commission you can give a maximum of €30 discount (75%). You must always keep at least €10 (25% of your commission = 10% of the total price).
promoCodes.maxDiscountDesc: Maximum 80% discount (you must always keep at least 20% of your commission).
promoCodes.maxDiscountDescSub: Maximum 75% discount of your own commission. As a made affiliate you receive 40% commission and must always keep at least 25% of it (10% of the total price).
promoCodes.maxDiscountError: You can give a maximum of {max}% discount. You must always keep at least 20% of your commission.
promoCodes.maxDiscountErrorSub: You can give a maximum of {max}% discount of your own commission. As a made affiliate you must always keep at least 25% of your commission (10% of the total price).

passiveIncome.scenarioDesc: Imagine you bring an average of just 2 businesses per month that sign up for a Pro subscription (€99/month). That's just 1 business every 2 weeks – very realistic with your network or via local outreach!
passiveIncome.after12Months: In this example, monthly commission share peaks around month 12 at €1,750 — depending on active subscriptions, transactions, and the applicable model (standard up to twelve months per business).
passiveIncome.basedOn: This is based on an average Pro subscription of €99/month, of which you receive 50% commission.
passiveIncome.evenOnDay364: Later referred active business subscriptions each receive their own twelve-month standard window under the model. That keeps planning predictable; it is not a promise that income continues indefinitely without further activation.
passiveIncome.calculatePotential: Calculate Your Potential with the Full Calculator

passiveIncome.noCosts: No signup costs, no monthly costs, no hidden costs.
passiveIncome.infiniteDesc: Since you invest nothing, every euro earned is pure profit.
passiveIncome.minimalDesc: A few minutes per month to share links and manage promo codes.

affiliate.ownYourAreaDesc: Become the owner of your neighborhood, village, or city. As an affiliate, you build a local market with recurring commission potential within the programme model. Perfect for artists, vloggers, local heroes, and anyone who wants to connect their network professionally.
affiliate.ownYourNeighborhoodDesc: Focus on your immediate area. Bring in local businesses and residents and become the go-to person for HomeCheff in your neighborhood.
affiliate.ownYourVillageDesc: Become the affiliate for your entire village. With a smaller market, you can quickly build a large market share and recurring commission under the standard model.
affiliate.ownYourCityDesc: Scale up to city level. Perfect for artists and vloggers with a larger reach. Build a network with durable recurring commission opportunities, per your agreement.
affiliate.localMarketPowerDesc: Local markets are powerful. People trust local recommendations. As the affiliate for your area, you become the trusted link between HomeCheff and your community — with room for long-term partnerships and recurring commission under clear terms.

financialSecurity.title: Long-term vision — within clear affiliate terms
financialSecurity.subtitle: Build recurring commission within the standard model; partnerships may evolve afterwards per your agreement.
financialSecurity.mainMessage: With the HomeCheff affiliate programme you build recurring commission on active subscriptions and transactions, within the contractual framework. The first twelve months per referred business subscription are defined in that model; further extensions are possible but not guaranteed.

keyPoints.point1Desc: For each active referred business subscription, the standard model includes up to twelve months of recurring commission. Later referrals each get their own window.
keyPoints.point2Desc: With consistent activation and strong customer relationships, you can build recurring commission within the applicable rules. Outcomes depend on adoption and market dynamics — not a fixed income promise.
keyPoints.point3Desc: No investment needed, no monthly costs, no hidden fees. Every euro you earn is pure profit. You can stop at any time without loss.
keyPoints.point4Desc: The more relevant demand you bring, the higher your recurring commission potential can become within the model. Examples are illustrative, not a promise of results.

financialSecurity.exampleDesc: Imagine: You bring in 2 businesses per month for 12 months. After 12 months you have:
financialSecurity.exampleContinues: Many customers stay active in practice; the standard commission window per business remains finite. Further collaboration may follow future programmes, always per your agreement.
financialSecurity.securityMessage: Affiliate earnings depend on performance and programme terms. Read your agreement, promote honestly, and plan with realistic assumptions.
financialSecurity.cta: Start Building Your Financial Security Now

passiveIncomeCalculator.title: Recurring commission calculator
passiveIncomeCalculator.subtitle: Model · partner · grow
passiveIncomeCalculator.description: Estimate commission from your inputs, then see how the standard model, partnerships, and a wider ecosystem horizon fit together—grounded in your agreement, not hype.
passiveIncomeCalculator.narrativeStandardBody: The programme provides up to twelve months of recurring commission per active referred business subscription. The first twelve months are defined in your current agreement; if a subscription ends, that commission stream stops. Terms and rates may evolve later with notice.
passiveIncomeCalculator.narrativePartnershipBody: HomeCheff is a long-term ecosystem for creators, neighbourhoods, and businesses. Active affiliates can grow alongside adoption and product depth. Future incentives, performance goals, and community milestones may extend or reshape collaboration—always communicated in advance, never as a guaranteed payout.
passiveIncomeCalculator.narrativeFutureVisionBody: We are building for growing together: as international reach and communities deepen, strong partners can unlock larger recurring income opportunities over time—within clear rules and evolving programme design.
passiveIncomeCalculator.narrativeFutureIntro: Not a forecast or promise. One ambitious, internationally minded lens on ecosystem scale—your results will differ.
passiveIncomeCalculator.timelineY1Body: Build your first network of makers, businesses, and buyers discovering HomeCheff through you.
passiveIncomeCalculator.timelineY2Body: Many customers stay active for years while you keep widening the community and refining how you show up.
passiveIncomeCalculator.timelineY35Body: Strong affiliates and communities may access expanded collaborations, added incentives, and larger recurring income streams—as the programme matures and eligibility evolves.
passiveIncomeCalculator.timelineY710Body: Partners who grow with the mission could sit inside a much larger international network of businesses, creators, and neighbourhoods—if strategy, regulation, and adoption align.
passiveIncomeCalculator.narrativeFutureDisclaimer: Illustrative storyline only. No guaranteed income, tenure, timing, or lifetime commissions.
passiveIncomeCalculator.commissionDetailsBody: You earn 25% of HomeCheff's platform fee per referred transaction side (50% when you refer both buyer and seller). Buyers count too. Example stacks often use about 12% platform fee for private sellers and about 4% for Pro business transactions—actual fees depend on plans and live activity.

growth.heroTitle: Earn with makers in your network
growth.heroSubtitle: Share your link with creators, agencies, and communities. Earn on transactions and business subscriptions in the standard model (up to 12 months per active subscription).
growth.modelBullet1: Transactions: up to 25% of the HomeCheff fee per side; up to 50% if you refer both buyer and seller.
growth.modelBullet2: Subscriptions: up to 50% per month in the standard model, for up to 12 months per active referred business.
growth.modelBullet3: Payouts: weekly via Stripe Connect after onboarding.
growth.dashboardBandBody: Referral link, QR, promo codes, and reporting — in one place.
growth.howSubtitle: From first link to weekly payouts — structured and transparent.
growth.recurringIntro: You earn on two tracks: users (buyer and/or seller) and business subscriptions. For subscriptions, commission can repeat monthly while the business stays subscribed, for up to twelve months per referred business — as set out in your affiliate terms.
growth.recurringCard1Body: Up to 25% of the HomeCheff fee per transaction side you refer; up to 50% if you refer both buyer and seller. Active users mean ongoing transaction commission within the programme model.
growth.recurringCard2Body: Up to 50% of the subscription amount per month, for up to twelve months per business you refer, while the subscription runs. If the subscription ends, that commission stream ends too.
growth.recurringCard3Body: You may share your link honestly anywhere (TikTok, Instagram, newsletters, events). Where people can sign up depends on HomeCheff availability and local rules — no misleading claims.
growth.recurringLegal: Exact percentages, durations, and exceptions are in the affiliate agreement and terms. The first twelve months sit within the current commission model; terms may evolve afterwards. HomeCheff may change rates with at least 30 days’ notice.
growth.example1Body: Neighbourhood admins who want to connect residents and makers with a trustworthy local marketplace.
growth.example2Body: Cooks, growers, and makers who already publish content and want their audience to discover what is truly available nearby.
growth.example3Body: Recruiters, agencies, and clubs that help small businesses get visibility while building an additional income stream.
growth.audiencesSubtitle: Not only influencers with huge followings — smaller, high-trust networks work too.
growth.toolsTitle: What you get in the dashboard
growth.toolsSubtitle: Everything to share professionally — without spammy tooling.
growth.toolLinkBody: One clear link for social, email, and bios. Attribution is tracked automatically.
growth.toolQrBody: Download or print QR codes for flyers, markets, or your shop — great for offline traffic.
growth.toolPromoBody: Create codes for business subscriptions; discounts come from your commission share within the limits shown in the dashboard.
growth.toolStatsBody: See referrals, status, and payouts. Weekly payouts via Stripe Connect after onboarding.
growth.dashboardPreviewBody: After signup you’ll see your link, QR options, promo codes, and commission overview — control without spreadsheet stress.
growth.faqSubtitle: Short answers; details are in your agreement and the full FAQ.
growth.faq1Q: How does the HomeCheff affiliate programme work?
growth.faq1A: You share your unique link or promo code. When someone becomes a buyer, seller, or business subscriber through your attribution, commission is calculated per the programme and shown in your dashboard.
growth.faq2Q: How much commission do I get?
growth.faq2A: Up to 25% of the HomeCheff fee per referred transaction side (buyer or seller), up to 50% if you refer both sides. For business subscriptions, up to 50% of the subscription amount for up to twelve months per business while active — see the examples on this page.
growth.faq3A: Transaction commission follows usage from your referrals. For business subscriptions, the standard window runs up to twelve months per active business under the current model; if the subscription ends or is cancelled, that commission stream ends.
growth.faq4A: Payouts are weekly via Stripe Connect, after successful onboarding and subject to dashboard payout rules.
growth.faq5Q: Can I create my own discount codes?
growth.faq5A: Yes — as a main affiliate you can create promo codes for business subscriptions. Discounts are applied from your commission share within the maximum rules shown in the dashboard.
growth.faq6A: You may share your link internationally as long as marketing is honest and compliant. Where HomeCheff is available may change; always check current terms.
growth.faq7Q: Do I need to be a seller on HomeCheff?
growth.faq7A: No. Affiliates are separate from selling on the marketplace. Many partners promote without listing products themselves.
growth.faq8A: For referred business subscriptions, you receive a monthly share within the standard model; the first twelve months are covered under the current commission framework. After that, the partnership may evolve through clearly communicated incentives — not a promise of lifetime income.
growth.faq12A: The standard affiliate window runs up to twelve months per active referred business subscription; that period is clearly defined in the current model. After that, the partnership may be extended or expanded through future incentives, performance milestones, and community goals. HomeCheff remains focused on long-term partnerships; exact terms are in your agreement.
growth.faq13A: That may be possible, but it is not guaranteed. HomeCheff may extend or adjust partnership models; updates are communicated in advance and reflected in your terms.
growth.faq9A: Stripe handles identity, compliance, and payouts to your bank account. You complete a one-time onboarding in the dashboard before payouts start.
growth.faq10A: You have one primary referral link to use everywhere. Promo codes and QR assets support different campaigns.
growth.faq11Q: What am I allowed to promote?
growth.faq11A: HomeCheff as a platform for local, homemade, and community commerce. No misleading income claims, no spam, and respect advertising and platform rules.
